title: CoCo-ST detects global and local biological structures in spatial transcriptomics datasets
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"b6kjb","text":"A protocol describing the application of the CoCo-ST algorithm on spatial transcriptomics datasets to detect biologically relevant spatial structures. We demonstrate CoCo-ST's ability to detect low variance spatial structures driving tumor progression.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fmfql","text":"Two main challenges with precancer analysis are:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fp0cc","text":"The high variance in global spatial patterns which might lead to the overlook of local, low-variance domains that hold significant biological relevance.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7brqs","text":"The complexity of spatial domain detection across diverse tissue samples with varying spatial resolutions, necessitating a robust and scalable approach.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ddfe4","text":"Here, we show CoCo-ST’s contrastive learning approach for identifying both high and low-variance spatial structures, leveraging multi-sample data. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b7me7","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f8ikm","text":"This protocol is associated with our proposed CoCo-ST algorithm for spatial domain detection in Nature Cell Biology","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Graph Construction fdata <- abnormalTissue@assays[["SCT"]]@scale.data flocation <- GetTissueCoordinates(abnormalTissue) bdata <- normalTissue@assays[["SCT"]]@scale.data blocation <- GetTissueCoordinates(normalTissue)
Create Dimensionality Reduction Object in Seurat.
Run UMAP on CoCoST representations and perform clustering.
Generate the spatial domain cluster plot:
CoCoST Code: The CoCoST algorithm can be downloaded from the following GitHub repository: Download CoCoST from GitHub
